message:
style(tests): Clean up test infrastructure formatting

Apply rustfmt and clippy lints across the test suite:

tests/common/:
- input_sim.rs: Add newline separators
- metrics.rs: Formatting fix
- mock_terminal.rs: Add newline separators

tests/fixtures/:
- assertions.rs: Add newline
- mock_input.rs: Add newlines
- mock_terminal.rs: Add newlines
- test_data.rs: Reorder use statements

tests/:
- e2e_input_flow.rs: Use statement ordering
- fixtures_test.rs: Remove unused imports
- memory_safety_regression.rs: Format string inline args
- proptest_color_ops.rs: Remove unused imports

No functional changes - pure style cleanup to satisfy CI lints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
